---
title: Environment Variables Overview
description: Complete reference for MX8 environment variables across coordinator, agent, and runtime components
---

## Overview

MX8 uses environment variables prefixed with `MX8_` for all configuration. Every CLI argument has a corresponding environment variable, allowing flexible deployment across containerized and bare-metal environments.

## Variable Categories

Environment variables are organized by component and stability:

<CardGroup cols={2}>
  <Card title="Coordinator Variables" icon="server" href="/api/env/coordinator">
    Control-plane configuration for the coordinator process (`MX8_COORD_*`, `MX8_WORLD_SIZE`, etc.)
  </Card>
  
  <Card title="Agent Variables" icon="microchip" href="/api/env/agent">
    Agent-specific settings for node management and data pipeline (`MX8_BATCH_SIZE_*`, `MX8_MAX_*`, etc.)
  </Card>
  
  <Card title="Runtime Variables" icon="gauge-high" href="/api/env/runtime">
    Runtime and performance tuning parameters (`MX8_MAX_INFLIGHT_BYTES`, `MX8_PREFETCH_*`, etc.)
  </Card>
</CardGroup>

## Stability Classes

All MX8 environment variables are classified by stability:

- **`stable`**: Production/operator contract; backward-compatible within v1.x
- **`experimental`**: Shipped but expected to evolve; use with caution
- **`internal`**: Dev/gate/test-only; no compatibility guarantees

<Warning>
  Internal variables (used by demos, gates, and benchmarks) are not covered in this reference. They have no compatibility guarantees and are subject to change without notice.
</Warning>

## Common Patterns

### Boolean Values

Boolean environment variables accept multiple formats:
- `true`, `false` (string)
- `1`, `0` (numeric)
- `yes`, `no` (for some variables)
- `on`, `off` (for some variables)

### Time Values

All timing values are specified in **milliseconds** (suffix `-ms` in variable name).

### Paths and URLs

- Filesystem paths support `~` expansion for home directory
- S3 paths use `s3://bucket/prefix` format
- Azure Blob paths use `az://container/prefix` format
- GCS paths use `gs://bucket/prefix` format

### Defaults and Derivation

Many variables have derived defaults based on other settings:
- `MX8_MIN_WORLD_SIZE` defaults to `MX8_WORLD_SIZE` if set to `0`
- `MX8_COORD_HA_LEASE_PATH` derives from `MX8_MANIFEST_STORE_ROOT`
- `MX8_LEASE_LOG_PATH` derives from `MX8_MANIFEST_STORE_ROOT`

## Production Baseline

Before running any production job, explicitly set:

<CodeGroup>
```bash Coordinator
MX8_WORLD_SIZE=<node-count>
MX8_DATASET_LINK='s3://bucket/dataset/@refresh'
MX8_MANIFEST_STORE_ROOT='s3://bucket/manifests/'
MX8_GRPC_MAX_MESSAGE_BYTES=67108864
```

```bash Agent
MX8_COORD_URL='http://coordinator-host:50051'
MX8_JOB_ID='<unique-job-id>'
MX8_NODE_ID='<stable-node-id>'
MX8_MAX_PROCESS_RSS_BYTES=<policy-default>
MX8_GRPC_MAX_MESSAGE_BYTES=67108864
```
</CodeGroup>

<Warning>
  **Never** rely on unpinned dataset paths in production. Always use `@refresh` or `@sha256:<hash>` suffixes with `MX8_DATASET_LINK`.
</Warning>

## Cloud Storage Configuration

### S3

- `MX8_S3_ENDPOINT_URL`: Override for S3-compatible services (MinIO, LocalStack)
- `MX8_S3_FORCE_PATH_STYLE`: Force path-style addressing (auto-enabled with endpoint override)

### Azure Blob Storage

- `MX8_AZURE_ENDPOINT_URL`: Azure or emulator endpoint
- `MX8_AZURE_ANONYMOUS`: Enable anonymous access (default: `false`)

### Google Cloud Storage

- `MX8_GCS_ENDPOINT_URL`: GCS emulator or custom endpoint
- `MX8_GCS_ANONYMOUS`: Enable anonymous access (default: `false`)

## Logging

`MX8_LOG` controls Rust tracing output. Falls back to `RUST_LOG`, then defaults to `info`.

<CodeGroup>
```bash Info Level (Default)
MX8_LOG=info
```

```bash Debug Coordinator Only
MX8_LOG=mx8_coordinator=debug,info
```

```bash Trace All MX8 Crates
MX8_LOG=mx8=trace
```
</CodeGroup>
